sources.evidence: The supplied Facebook share URL resolved to the public Screamin' Eagles musician/band page at the exact canonical handle @thescreamineagles; the page displays current posts, 3.7K followers and the artist contact email.
The Echo identifies the act as a Melbourne party-rock band and describes its high-energy live sound, instrumentation and Australian touring profile.
The 2026 Brighter Days Festival guide identifies the Screamin' Eagles lineup and describes their Eagles repertoire, rock anthems, multiple vocalists, guitars, keys and sax.
